Package org.mitre.synthea.world.agents

Class Payer

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.world.agents.Payer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Payer extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a payer organization that provides insurance plans.
See Also:

  • Field Details

    • uuid

      public final String uuid
      Universally unique identifier for the payer.

  • Constructor Details

    • Payer

      public Payer(String name, int id, Set<String> statesCovered, String ownership)
      Payer constructor.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the payer.
      id - The payer ID.
      statesCovered - The list of states covered.
      ownership - The type of ownership (private/government).

  • Method Details

    • addPlan

      public void addPlan(InsurancePlan newPlan)
      Adds a new insurance plan to the payer.
      Parameters:
      newPlan - The insurance plan to add.

    • isGovernmentPayer

      public boolean isGovernmentPayer()
      Checks if the payer is a government payer.
      Returns:
      True if the payer is a government payer, false otherwise.

    • getResourceID

      public String getResourceID()
      Gets the resource ID of the payer.
      Returns:
      The resource ID of the payer.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of the payer.
      Returns:
      the name.

    • getOwnership

      public String getOwnership()
      Returns the ownership type of the payer (Government/Private).
      Returns:
      the ownership type.

    • getAttributes

      public Map<String,Object> getAttributes()
      Returns the Map of the payer's second class attributes.
      Returns:
      any second-class attributes.

    • getPlans

      public List<InsurancePlan> getPlans()
      Returns the set of plans offered by this payer.
      Returns:
      the set of plans.

    • coversCare

      public boolean coversCare(HealthRecord.Entry entry)
      Returns whether or not this payer will cover the given entry.
      Parameters:
      entry - the entry that needs covering.
      Returns:
      whether this payer covers the care of the entry.

    • adjustClaim

      public BigDecimal adjustClaim(Claim.ClaimEntry claimEntry, Person person)
      Determines whether or not this payer will adjust this claim, and by how much. This determination is based on the claim adjustment strategy configuration, which defaults to none.
      Parameters:
      claimEntry - The claim entry to be adjusted.
      person - The person making the claim.
      Returns:
      The dollar amount the claim entry was adjusted.

    • incrementCustomers

      public void incrementCustomers(String personId)
      Increments the number of unique users.
      Parameters:
      personId - the person id who utilized the payer.

    • incrementCoveredEntries

      public void incrementCoveredEntries(HealthRecord.Entry entry)
      Increments the entries covered by this payer.
      Parameters:
      entry - the entry covered.

    • incrementUncoveredEntries

      public void incrementUncoveredEntries(HealthRecord.Entry entry)
      Increments the entries not covered by this payer.
      Parameters:
      entry - the entry covered.

    • addCoveredCost

      public void addCoveredCost(BigDecimal costToPayer)
      Increases the total costs incurred by the payer by the given amount.
      Parameters:
      costToPayer - the cost of the current encounter, after the patient's copay.

    • addUncoveredCost

      public void addUncoveredCost(BigDecimal costToPatient)
      Increases the costs the payer did not cover by the given amount.
      Parameters:
      costToPatient - the costs that the payer did not cover.

    • addQols

      public void addQols(double qols)
      Adds the Quality of Life Score (QOLS) of a patient of the current (past?) year. Increments the total number of years covered (for averaging out purposes).
      Parameters:
      qols - the Quality of Life Score to be added.

    • getRevenue

      public BigDecimal getRevenue()
      Returns the total amount of money received from patients. Consists of monthly premium payments.
      Returns:
      the total revenue.

    • getCustomerUtilization

      public int getCustomerUtilization(String personId)
      Returns the number of years the given customer was with this Payer.
      Parameters:
      personId - The person to check for.
      Returns:
      The number of years the person was with the payer.

    • getUniqueCustomers

      public int getUniqueCustomers()
      Returns the total number of unique customers of this payer.
      Returns:
      the number of unique customers.

    • getNumYearsCovered

      public int getNumYearsCovered()
      Returns the total number of member years covered by this payer.
      Returns:
      the number of years covered.

    • getEncountersCoveredCount

      public int getEncountersCoveredCount()
      Returns the number of encounters this payer paid for.
      Returns:
      the number of covered encounters.

    • getEncountersUncoveredCount

      public int getEncountersUncoveredCount()
      Returns the number of encounters this payer did not cover for their customers.
      Returns:
      the number of uncovered patient encounters.

    • getMedicationsCoveredCount

      public int getMedicationsCoveredCount()
      Returns the number of medications this payer paid for.
      Returns:
      the number of covered medications.

    • getMedicationsUncoveredCount

      public int getMedicationsUncoveredCount()
      Returns the number of medications this payer did not cover for their customers.
      Returns:
      the number of uncovered patient medications.

    • getProceduresCoveredCount

      public int getProceduresCoveredCount()
      Returns the number of procedures this payer paid for.
      Returns:
      the number of covered procedures.

    • getProceduresUncoveredCount

      public int getProceduresUncoveredCount()
      Returns the number of procedures this payer did not cover for their customers.
      Returns:
      the number of uncovered patient procedures.

    • getImmunizationsCoveredCount

      public int getImmunizationsCoveredCount()
      Returns the number of immunizations this payer paid for.
      Returns:
      the number of covered immunizations.

    • getImmunizationsUncoveredCount

      public int getImmunizationsUncoveredCount()
      Returns the number of immunizations this payer did not cover for their customers.
      Returns:
      the number of uncovered patient immunizations.

    • getAmountCovered

      public BigDecimal getAmountCovered()
      Returns the amount of money the payer paid for healthcare.
      Returns:
      the total value of coverage paid.

    • getAmountUncovered

      public BigDecimal getAmountUncovered()
      Returns the amount of money the payer did not cover.'
      Returns:
      the total value of uncovered patient healthcare.

    • getQolsAverage

      public double getQolsAverage()
      Returns the average of the payer's QOLS of customers over the number of years covered.
      Returns:
      the average QOLS of the payer's patients.

      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object

      Overrides:
      equals in class Object

      public void setPayerAdjustment(IPayerAdjustment payerAdjustment)
      Sets the payer claim adjustment strategy.
      Parameters:
      payerAdjustment - The payer adjustment algorithm.

    • addRevenue

      public void addRevenue(BigDecimal additionalRevenue)
      Adds the given revenue to the payer.
      Parameters:
      additionalRevenue - The revenue to add.

    • getGovernmentPayerPlan

      public InsurancePlan getGovernmentPayerPlan()
      Returns the government payer plan if this is a government payer.
      Returns:
      This payer's government payer plan.

    • addAttribute

      public void addAttribute(String key, String value)
      Add additional attributes to Payer.
      Parameters:
      key - The attribute key.
      value - The attribute value.

      public boolean isNoInsurance()
      Returns whether this is the no insurance payer.
      Returns:
      Returns whether this is no insurance.

    • getPlanLinkId

      public int getPlanLinkId()
      Returns the plan link id for this payer.
      Returns:
      The plan link id.
